use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers or account menus
Show user avatars in comment sections or discussion threads
Present user images in friend lists or contact directories
Display user avatars in social media feeds and activity streams
Show status indicators alongside user avatars in real-time chat applications
ai_summary: A lightweight user avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with customizable status indicators. Features composable sub-components for image, fallback, and status display. Supports online/offline/busy/away states with variant-driven styling. Designed for universal use across web applications requiring user representation.
